title: Design for Observability
description: Decide what to log, measure, and trace before building.
content:
For this system or feature: {{system}}

Design its observability up front. Define the key metrics (the few that reveal health and the user-facing SLIs), the logs worth keeping (and at what level), and where traces would untangle a cross-service request. Decide what a good dashboard shows at a glance and what alert would page someone — tied to symptoms users feel, not noisy internals. Flag what you would wish you had logged the first time this breaks.
